content.text: Design Note - SM-1085: PWA Expense Module
Components Requiring Changes
Frontend (PWA - Next.js)
New page:
src/app/expense/page.tsx
(Expense list + search)
New page:
src/app/expense/[id]/page.tsx
(Expense detail view)
New page:
src/app/expense/edit/page.tsx
(Create expense)
New page:
src/app/expense/edit/[id]/page.tsx
(Edit expense)
New components in
src/components/expense/
ExpenseCardItem.tsx
(list card rendering)
ExpenseEditForm.tsx
(create/edit form with all field logic)
MileageCalculator.tsx
(from/to location pickers + mileage calculation)
Modified:
src/services/api.ts
(add expense API methods)
Modified:
src/components/SMHeader.tsx
(add Expense nav link to sidebar menu)
Backend (CakePHP)
- No changes required. All existing API endpoints are reused.
Database
- No changes required.
Application Routes Impacted
Route
Purpose
/expense
Expense search/list view (default: last 1 year)
/expense/[id]
Expense detail view (read-only)
/expense/edit
Create new expense form
/expense/edit/[id]
Edit existing expense form
API Endpoints (Existing - No Changes)
Method
Endpoint
Purpose
GET
/timesheets/expensemeta
Fetch metadata (types, payment types, mileage rate, offices, reasons, comment rules)
GET
/timesheets/expenselist/{startDate}/{endDate}
Search expenses by date range
POST
/timesheets/saveexpenseapi
Create or update an expense (JSON or multipart for attachment)
GET
/requests/wosearchopen/{query}
Search open work orders (for WO# field autocomplete)
GET
/apis/scheduledWOs/{userId}
Get scheduled work orders (for WO# dropdown toggle)
GET
/downloads/ms/{base64_filename}
Download expense attachment image
Models/Data Impacted
Expense Object:

id, user_id, expense_date, expenseitem_id, amount, paymenttype_id, reason, comment, request_id, request_work_order, reimbursable, type, payment_type, approved, approved_date, user_name, entered, doc_name, extra (miles), milesfrom, milesto
Metadata Object:
expense_types[], payment_types[], defaultexpenses{}, mileage_item, mileage_rate, offices[], reasons[], comments_required{expense_types[], payment_types[]}
Outline of Necessary Changes
Expense Search/List Page (AC1, AC2)
Date range picker (start/end) defaulting to last 1 year
Search button to call /timesheets/expenselist
FlatList-style rendering of ExpenseCardItem components showing: date, amount, type, approval status
Sort by expense_date descending
FAB button to navigate to create form
Loading/refresh states
Expense Detail View (AC3)
Read-only display of all expense fields: WO#, date entered, amount, approval status, approved by/date, type, payment type, reimbursable, comment
Image modal for viewing attachment (doc_name via /downloads/ms endpoint)
Edit FAB to navigate to edit form
Create/Edit Expense Form (AC4, AC5)
Date picker (max: today)
Expense type dropdown (dynamically loaded from metadata - AC5)
Payment type dropdown (dynamically loaded from metadata - AC5)
Reimbursable checkbox
Conditional reason selector (shown when expense/payment type is in comments_required lists)
Comment textarea
WO# field with dual mode: manual entry with autocomplete (debounced 500ms via /requests/wosearchopen) OR scheduled WO dropdown toggle (via /apis/scheduledWOs)
WO validation indicator (pending/valid/invalid)
Amount field (auto-populated from defaultexpenses metadata per type, or auto-calculated for mileage)
File attachment picker (camera or file upload, replaces react-native-image-crop-picker with HTML file input)
Comprehensive validation: required fields, amount > 0, mileage fields if mileage type, comment if required by metadata
Mileage Calculator (AC6)
Shown conditionally when expense type equals metadata.mileage_item
From location input (text input - replacing Google Places autocomplete with simple text input + office suggestions dropdown)
To location input (same pattern)
Miles numeric input
Auto-calculation: amount = miles x metadata.mileage_rate
Office list from metadata as quick-select suggestions
Navigation Integration
Add 'Expense' entry to SMHeader sidebar menu
Route: /expense
Design Considerations
Google Places Autocomplete:

The RN app uses react-native-google-places-autocomplete for mileage from/to fields. For PWA, we will use a text input with a predefined office dropdown (from metadata) since Google Places API requires a Maps API key and billing. If Google Places integration is needed, it can be added later.
File Upload:
The RN app uses react-native-image-crop-picker. For PWA, we will use a standard HTML file input (accept=image/*) with camera capture support on mobile browsers via the capture attribute.
State Management:
Following the established PWA pattern - React Context + component-level useState (no Redux). Expense metadata can be fetched on mount and cached in component state.
Pattern Consistency:

Will follow the same structure as Clock Simple and Timesheet modules: SMContainer > SMHeader > SMContent wrapper, react-native-web components, useAuth/useTheme hooks, api.ts for backend calls, react-hot-toast for notifications.
Resolution - SM-1085: PWA Expense Module
Summary
Converted the Expense module from the React Native mobile app to the SiteManager PWA (Next.js). All 6 acceptance criteria implemented.
What Changed
src/services/api.ts
— Added expense API methods (getExpenseMeta, searchExpenses, saveExpense, getExpenseAttachmentUrl) with real and mock implementations, plus ExpenseMeta and ExpenseItem TypeScript interfaces
src/components/SMHeader.tsx
— Added Expenses navigation link to sidebar menu (between Timesheet and Clock Simple)
src/app/expense/page.tsx
— Expense search/list page with date range filtering, sorted card list, FAB to create
src/app/expense/detail/page.tsx
— Expense detail view with all fields, attachment image modal, FAB to edit
src/app/expense/edit/page.tsx
— Create/edit expense form (shared component handles both modes)
src/components/expense/ExpenseCardItem.tsx
— Card component showing status badge, date, approval info, amount
src/components/expense/ExpenseEditForm.tsx
— Full expense form with expense type, payment type, mileage calculator, WO search (manual + scheduled toggle), attachment upload, validation
src/components/expense/MileageCalculator.tsx
— Mileage sub-form with from/to location inputs (office suggestions) and auto-calculated amount
src/app/not-found.tsx
— 404 page (required for Next.js static export build)
Commits
Frontend Git: SM-1085 branch, commit b4c08f6, merged to develop
Testing Guide
Test URL:
Login: hawseyl / test1234
Scenario 1: Navigation (AC1)
Login and open sidebar menu
Verify 'Expenses' appears between Timesheet and Clock Simple
Tap Expenses — should navigate to expense list page
Scenario 2: Search Expenses (AC1, AC2)
On expense list page, verify default date range is 1 year back to today
Verify expense cards are displayed sorted by date (newest first)
Change date range and tap Search — list should update
Tap refresh icon in header — should reload data
Scenario 3: Expense Detail (AC3)
Tap any expense card — should navigate to detail page
Verify all fields displayed: WO#, Date Entered, Amount, Approved status, Type, Payment Type, Reimbursable, Comment
If expense has mileage: verify From, To, Miles fields shown
If expense has attachment: verify attachment link is clickable and opens image modal
Tap back arrow — should return to list
Scenario 4: Create Expense (AC4, AC5)
On expense list, tap the red + FAB button
Verify 'New Expense' form opens
Verify Type dropdown loads expense types from server (AC5)
Verify Payment Type dropdown loads payment types from server (AC5)
Select a type that has a default amount — verify Amount field auto-populates and is read-only
Select a type/payment that requires a reason — verify Reason dropdown appears with warning
Toggle 'Scheduled' switch on WO# field — verify it switches between text input and dropdown
In manual WO mode, type a WO number — verify autocomplete search with validation
Attach an image — verify preview appears
Fill all required fields and tap Save — verify success toast and redirect to list
Verify the new expense appears in the list
Scenario 5: Edit Expense (AC4)
Tap an expense card to view detail
Tap the red edit FAB button
Verify 'Edit Expense' form opens with all fields pre-populated
Change a field and save — verify changes are reflected
Scenario 6: Mileage Calculation (AC6)
Create new expense and select the Mileage expense type
Verify From, To, Miles fields appear
Enter miles value — verify Amount auto-calculates (miles x mileage rate)
Verify From/To inputs show office suggestions
Save mileage expense — verify it appears in list with correct amount

QA Fix - SM-1085: Expense Module
Issues Fixed
Directory listing on refresh
— Navigating to /expense/ showed Apache directory listing instead of the expense page. Fixed .htaccess to disable directory serving and handle trailing slashes.
Metadata loading stuck
— New Expense form showed 'Loading metadata...' forever when sessionStorage was empty. Added API fallback fetch and null guard on initFromMeta.
Reimbursable checkbox not working
— Custom Pressable+View checkbox didn't respond to clicks. Replaced with native HTML checkbox.
Date format warning
— moment.js deprecation warning on detail page. Added explicit date format parsing.
Attachment image
— Added crossOrigin attribute for cross-origin image loading.
Commits
Frontend Git: SM-1085 branch, commit ef890dc, merged to develop
Re-test Scenarios
Navigate to Expenses, refresh the page — should show expense list (not directory listing)
Click + to create new expense — form should load immediately with dropdowns populated
Toggle Reimbursable to me checkbox — should check/uncheck reliably
View expense detail — Date Entered should show without console warnings
View expense with attachment — click attachment link to view image in modal
Retesting issues
Issue:
When opening an attachment, it is too dark, you can’t see it.
Issue:
When you go back into an expense and click on Edit, you can’t see the preview.
Verified when you refresh the expense screen that it works.
Listing for modules is okay that it is in different order. Matches app.
Verified the Reimbursable to me toggle works now.
QA Fix Round 2 - SM-1085: Attachment Display
Issues Fixed
Attachment modal showed dark empty overlay
- Removed crossOrigin attribute that was blocking same-origin image loading. Added fallback text 'Unable to load attachment' when image fails instead of silent failure.
Broken image icon in edit page
- Separated inline preview (for new file uploads with error handling) from existing attachment display.
Attachment 404 on test server

- Root cause: expense files are stored in 'files/docs_expenses/<expense_id>/<filename>' but /downloads/ms endpoint only looks in 'files/' directly. Switched to /downloads/mv2 with URL-safe base64 encoded full path (backend base64_url_decode converts -_, to +/=).
Show existing attachment inline on edit page
- Match RN app UX by displaying the current attachment image preview directly in the edit form instead of a clickable link. Falls back to clickable link only if the image fails to load.
Commits
Frontend Git: SM-1085 branch, commits 084b9c4, 2266497, f85d192, all merged to develop
